subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, for that the ocean of forgiveness hath surged upon the people of rebellion, and thanksgiving be unto Thee, O Thou my heart's Desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما ماج بحر الغفران علی اهل العصیان و لک الشکر یا منائی بما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
